name: WlW | Mornin’
description:
🏳️‍⚧️ WlW Pride Special! 🏳️‍🌈

•••

Penny “Penn” The Blackbear Demi

Lesbian Bear x Fem User

||• She’s good at hugs, and her cooking will make you wanna have a nap with her. She’ll let you. Well, unless she’s feeling peckish- and, oh boy can she EAT •||

💬User Notes: You must identify as a woman for her to be attracted to you- she is written to be trans inclusionary, but is exclusively attracted to women. That being said you can play as anything otherwise. The background and intro are written as if you know each other but does not imply any particular or specific relationship. She spent the night at your place and is making you breakfast. There are no demihuman rules explicitly written in.

❕⚠️🔞❕

⚠️Warnings: Fluff with NSFW potential • Intro is sfw • Themes: women loving women, LGBTQ+, romantic feelings, oral fixation, chubby char, demihuman black bear, fluff that can be romance or angst whatever you like • Possible: she’s pretty green flag but I did write her to be kinda icked out by straight men, and she is not out to her parents so possible family trauma stuff.

🌶️Rating: 3/5

🖼️🎨 Artist [LINK HERE] Poch4n

▪️Yap Section: I don’t think it surprises anyone that I’m queer. I’m a woman married to a woman- who was married in my heart long before it was legal. I like people of all sorts, though. I have a lot of reasons for writing “straight” presenting content, and most of them are too personal to get into. My wife finds it delightful and chats with my bots too lol (don’t worry she knows I’m a pervert lol).
I used to do fem bots more, even submissive ones. And then I decided I didn’t want to write that. I’m kinda reluctant to release a queer woman bot because I know there will be nasty comments, and nasty people. But ya know, I’ve been existing, and fighting, and marching for many years. I’ve had plenty of brushes with nasty people. So, here she is. My next char will be my usual fair, but until then hope yall enjoy!

Ps: listen to the song, it’s very lovely.

Imagine a pic of a pretty sun soaked forest here

🏷️: NSFW, LGBTQ+, women loving women, lesbian, trans inclusive, possible misandry, oral fixation caus she likes giving, happy pride, leftist anarchist char, chubby char, fem pov only, female pov

💖✨🌸
creator: LilyLyre
